tasks.subject: Task 1: Flyway Migration — Add Preference Columns to app_user
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add 12 new columns to app_user with defaults and CHECK constraints.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V11__add_user_preferences.sql`

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn spring-boot:run` → migration applies successfully

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/resources/db/migration/V11__add_user_preferences.sql"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn spring-boot:run", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Migration runs without error", "All 12 columns added with correct types and defaults", "CHECK constraints enforce valid ranges"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 2: Backend Entity, DTOs, and Service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Extend AppUser with preference fields and create UserPreferencesService with DTOs.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/AppUser.java`
- Create: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/dto/PreferencesResponse.java`
- Create: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/dto/UpdatePreferencesRequest.java`
- Create: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesService.java`
- Test: `backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesServiceTest.java`

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -pl . -Dtest=UserPreferencesServiceTest` → all 7 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/AppUser.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/dto/PreferencesResponse.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/dto/UpdatePreferencesRequest.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesService.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesServiceTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -pl . -Dtest=UserPreferencesServiceTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["AppUser has getters/setters for all 5 active preference fields", "PreferencesResponse maps DayOfWeek as enum names", "UpdatePreferencesRequest allows partial updates", "Service validates timezone, time ordering, session-minute alignment", "Unit tests cover validation rules"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 3: Backend Controller and Exception Handler
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Expose GET and PATCH endpoints for user preferences at /api/v1/user/preferences.

**Files:**
- Create: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesController.java`
- Create: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesExceptionHandler.java`
- Test: `backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesControllerIntegrationTest.java`

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test -pl . -Dtest=UserPreferencesControllerIntegrationTest` → all 5 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesController.java", "backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesExceptionHandler.java", "backend/src/test/java/com/echel/planner/backend/auth/UserPreferencesControllerIntegrationTest.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test -pl . -Dtest=UserPreferencesControllerIntegrationTest", "acceptanceCriteria": ["GET returns 200 with all preference fields", "PATCH with valid partial payload returns 200", "PATCH with invalid timezone returns 422", "Unauthenticated requests return 401"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 4: Frontend API Layer and Settings Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Create preferences API functions, TanStack Query hooks, and the settings page UI.

**Files:**
- Create: `frontend/src/api/preferences.js`
- Create: `frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.jsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/App.jsx`
- Modify: `frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx`

**Verify:** Start dev server, navigate to /settings, verify form loads and save works.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/api/preferences.js", "frontend/src/pages/SettingsPage.jsx", "frontend/src/App.jsx", "frontend/src/layouts/AppLayout.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Settings page loads at /settings", "Saving valid changes shows success feedback", "Settings link appears in sidebar", "Timezone field is searchable"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 5: Wire Preferences into Schedule Service
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace hardcoded schedule defaults with user preferences.

**Files:**
- Modify: `backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleService.java`

**Verify:** `cd backend && mvn test` → all tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["backend/src/main/java/com/echel/planner/backend/schedule/ScheduleService.java"], "verifyCommand": "cd backend && mvn test", "acceptanceCriteria": ["savePlan uses user defaultStartTime/defaultEndTime when request omits hours", "Explicit startHour/endHour in request still override preferences", "Existing tests still pass"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 6: E2E Test for Settings Page
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Add Playwright E2E test for the settings page.

**Files:**
- Create: `e2e/tests/settings.spec.ts`

**Verify:** `cd e2e && npx playwright test settings.spec.ts` → all 4 tests pass

```json:metadata
{"files": ["e2e/tests/settings.spec.ts"], "verifyCommand": "cd e2e && npx playwright test settings.spec.ts", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Test verifies settings page loads with preferences", "Test verifies saving shows success feedback", "Test verifies validation errors display", "All API calls are mocked"]}
```

tasks.subject: Task 7: Wire Week Start Day into Frontend Ritual Components
tasks.description:
**Goal:** Replace hardcoded Monday week start in TaskSchedulePhase with user preference.

**Files:**
- Modify: `frontend/src/components/ritual/TaskSchedulePhase.jsx`

**Verify:** Start dev server, navigate to /start-week, verify calendar starts on configured day.

```json:metadata
{"files": ["frontend/src/components/ritual/TaskSchedulePhase.jsx"], "verifyCommand": "cd frontend && npm run lint", "acceptanceCriteria": ["Start Week calendar renders with configured week start day", "Day labels shift correctly", "Next week deferral calculation uses configured week start"]}
```
